commits.content:
import React, { useRef } from 'react'; import { FiPrinter, FiX } from 'react-icons/fi'; const Receipt = ({ transaction, onClose }) => { const receiptRef = useRef(); const handlePrint = () => { const printContent = receiptRef.current.innerHTML; const originalContent = document.body.innerHTML; document.body.innerHTML = printContent; window.print(); document.body.innerHTML = originalContent; window.location.reload(); }; return (

Receipt

{/* Receipt Content */}

Grocery Store

123 Main Street

Tel: (555) 123-4567

Date: {new Date(transaction.created_at).toLocaleString()}

Cashier: {transaction.cashier_name}

Receipt #: {transaction.id}

{transaction.items?.map((item, index) => ( ))}
Item Qty Price Total
{item.product_name} {item.quantity} ${item.price.toFixed(2)} ${(item.quantity * item.price).toFixed(2)}
Subtotal: ${(transaction.total + transaction.discount - transaction.tax).toFixed(2)}
{transaction.discount > 0 && (
Discount: -${transaction.discount.toFixed(2)}
)} {transaction.tax > 0 && (
Tax: ${transaction.tax.toFixed(2)}
)}
TOTAL: ${transaction.total.toFixed(2)}

Payment Method: {transaction.payment_method.toUpperCase()}

{transaction.payment_method === 'cash' && ( <>

Cash Given: ${transaction.cash_given?.toFixed(2)}

Change: ${transaction.change_due?.toFixed(2)}

)}

Thank you for shopping with us!

Please come again
